name: Morguard Corporation
description: Morguard Corporation is a fully integrated real estate company with a diversified, high-quality portfolio of assets across North America. The firm specializes in the acquisition, development, ownership, and management of multi-suite residential, commercial, and hotel properties. With over 50 years of experience, Morguard serves as a premier real estate investment advisor and management company, committed to delivering resilient performance and long-term growth through strong leadership and proven management strategies across its extensive portfolio of real estate assets.
